title: cerastium erectum var. octandrum
intro: Cerastium erectum var. octandrum, also known as Eight-horned Wheatgrass or Octandrous Mouse-ear, is a flowering plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include wound healing, skin issues, and respiratory problems alleviation, thanks to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Cerastium erectum var. octandrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
